atten3.ptxt: Wear protective gloves. Sharp areas on the seat frame and adjuster may injure your hands.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE VERTICAL ADJUSTER COVER LH (for Driver Seat)

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, disengage the 2 claws and remove the vertical adjuster cover LH.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE VERTICAL ADJUSTING HANDLE NO. 2 (for Driver Seat)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 screws and vertical adjusting handle.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE RECLINING ADJUSTER RELEASE HANDLE

s2.ptxt: Lift the reclining adjuster release handle.
Using a screwdriver, disengage the claw and remove the reclining adjuster release handle.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT SEAT CUSHION SHIELD

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 2 hooks.
Remove the 3 screws.
Disengage the 2 claws and remove the front seat cushion shield.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LOWER SEAT TRACK SPACER

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 screws and lower seat track spacer.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT SEAT INNER BELT ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: for Driver seat:

s3.ptxt: Disconnect the connectors and disengage the 4 clamps.

s2.ptxt: for Passenger seat:

s3.ptxt: Disconnect the connector and disengage the 3 clamps.

s2.ptxt: Remove the nut and front seat inner belt assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT INNER SEAT CUSHION SHIELD

s2.ptxt: Remove the screw.
Disengage the claw and clip, and then remove the front inner seat cushion shield.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT SEAT CUSHION COVER WITH PAD

s2.ptxt: Disengage the clamp.
Disengage the hooks and remove the front seat cushion cover with pad.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE SEPARATE TYPE FRONT SEAT CUSHION COVER

s2.ptxt: Remove the 16 hog rings and separate type front seat cushion cover.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT SEAT BACK BOARD SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 screws.
Disconnect the 14 clamps and front separate type seat back cover.
Pull the seat back board in the direction indicated by the arrow in the illustration to detach the 2 claws. Then, remove the seat back board.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT SEAT HEADREST SUPPORT

s2.ptxt: Detach the 2 claws and remove the headrest support.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT SEAT HEADREST SUPPORT
REMOVE FRONT SEAT BACK COVER WITH PAD

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 3 hooks.
Remove the 2 hog rings.
Remove the nut and separate the 2 brackets.
Remove the front seat back cover with pad.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT SEPARATE TYPE SEAT BACK COVER

s2.ptxt: Remove the 10 hog rings and front separate type seat back cover.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE RECLINING ADJUSTER INSIDE COVER LH

s2.ptxt: Disconnect the clamp.
Remove the screw.
Disengage the claw and remove the reclining adjuster inside cover LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE RECLINING ADJUSTER INSIDE COVER RH

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE RECLINING ADJUSTER INSIDE COVER LH

s2.ptxt: Remove the screw and reclining adjuster inside cover LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE RECLINING ADJUSTER INSIDE COVER RH

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT LOWER SEAT CUSHION SHIELD LH

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, disengage the claw and remove the front lower seat cushion shield LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT LOWER SEAT CUSHION SHIELD RH

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE SEAT POSITION SENSOR (for Driver Seat)

s2.ptxt: Disconnect the connector.
Using a "torx" socket wrench (T30), remove the "torx" screw and seat position sensor with the seat slide position sensor protector.
Remove the seat position sensor from the seat slide position sensor protector as shown in the illustration.
